name: cicurity
description: Supply chain attack prevention for npm, pnpm, and npx - quarantines and analyzes packages before installation

scripts.test: npx tsc --project tsconfig.test.json && cp -r src/vendor dist-test/src/vendor && node --test dist-test/tests/unit/analysis/scoring.test.js dist-test/tests/unit/analysis/typosquat.test.js dist-test/tests/unit/analysis/network-calls.test.js dist-test/tests/unit/analysis/obfuscation.test.js dist-test/tests/unit/internal/args.test.js dist-test/tests/unit/output/report.test.js
scripts.lint:no-deps: node -e "const p = JSON.parse(require('fs').readFileSync('package.json','utf8')); const d = Object.keys(p.dependencies||{}); if(d.length) { console.error('FAIL: runtime dependencies found:', d.join(', ')); process.exit(1); } else { console.log('OK: zero runtime dependencies'); }"
